hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\brm\b' && echo 'CAUTION: Be careful with file deletion. Make sure you know exactly what you are deleting and why. If you are unsure, stop and ask rather than proceeding.' ; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+push.+(-f|--force)' && echo 'BLOCKED: Force push is not allowed. It destroys git history and removes the ability to recover from mistakes. Use a different approach.' && exit 2; exit 0
